case_title: GENUINE PARTS COMPANY/NAPA AUTO PARTS VS. EMERALD AUTO & BRAKE INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GENUINE PARTS COMPANY/NAPA AUTO PARTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EMERALD AUTO & BRAKE INC. $11,414.14 PRINCIPAL, $1,200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,292.69 INTEREST, $433.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,340.33, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100093371)
